name: transit-gateway
title: AWS Transit — Transit Gateway
summary: Creates a transit gateway with VPC attachments, custom route tables, explicit associations/propagations for segmented topologies, and static (or blackhole) routes.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: amazon_side_asn
module.description: Private ASN for the Amazon side of BGP sessions (64512-65534 for 16-bit). Must not collide with on-premises or other cloud ASNs in the routing domain.

module.name: description
module.description: Human-readable description of the transit gateway.

module.name: enable_default_route_table_association
module.description: Automatically associate new attachments with the default TGW route table. Set false for segmented (multi-route-table) topologies.

module.name: enable_default_route_table_propagation
module.description: Automatically propagate routes from new attachments into the default TGW route table. Set false for segmented topologies.

module.name: enable_dns_support
module.description: Enable DNS support on the transit gateway.

module.name: enable_vpn_ecmp_support
module.description: Enable equal-cost multi-path routing across VPN attachments.

module.name: auto_accept_shared_attachments
module.description: Auto-accept attachment requests from accounts sharing via RAM.

module.name: vpc_attachments
module.type: map(object({ vpc_id = string subnet_ids = list(string) appliance_mode = optional(bool, false) dns_support = optional(bool, true) route_table_key = optional(string) propagate_to = optional(list(string), []) }))
module.description: VPC attachments keyed by logical name. route_table_key associates the attachment with a custom route table defined in route_tables; propagate_to lists route table keys that learn this attachment's routes.

module.name: route_tables
module.description: Logical names of custom TGW route tables to create (e.g., [\"prod\", \"shared\", \"inspection\"]).

module.name: static_routes
module.type: map(object({ route_table_key = string destination_cidr = string attachment_key = optional(string) blackhole = optional(bool, false) }))
module.description: Static TGW routes keyed by logical name. Point destination_cidr at an attachment or blackhole it.

outputs.name: attachment_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical attachment name to TGW VPC attachment ID.

outputs.name: route_table_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical route table name to TGW route table ID, plus 'default' for the TGW default association route table.

outputs.name: static_route_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical static route name to TGW route ID.
